case_title: AREA CODE DBA VS FEDERAL EXPRESS (ATTN D BARBETTI)

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO FEDERAL EXPRESS ATTN. D. BARBETTI RETURNED BY THE POST OFFICE.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,500.00 FILED BY AREA CODE DBA AS TO DEFENDANT FEDERAL EXPRESS (ATTN D BARBETTI) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-22-2000 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AREA CODE DBA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FEDERAL EXPRESS (ATTN D BARBETTI) $4,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,520.00, PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
